race.description: Tonkin Group Albury Guineas - Benchmark 74 Handicap
race.comment: BEYOND QUESTION (1) took a big step forward off his maiden win with a strong placing in the G3 CS Hayes, finishing 2.8L off Sixties who has since won the G2 Phar Lap. With a freshen and a soft draw he is well placed to strike. ETHEREUM GIRL (2) resumes for the Hayes team after being thrown into the deep end in the spring, last seen finishing fifth in the Oaks. With two sharp jump outs she looks ready to return with impact. PARTY BOSS (9) continues to build the right way this prep and was sound in the Wagga Qualifier. The fitness edge always counts for something. SPREAD THE LOVE (10) is still learning but should improve again off his Wagga win, while JAEGERS (4) maps to give supporters a sight on speed.
